summary: Leading architecture for a multi-tenant commerce platform serving regional retail and distribution operations.
responsibilities: Defined service boundaries, API standards, and event contracts across order, pricing, loyalty, and reporting domains.
Partnered with product and engineering managers to break architectural roadmap into delivery milestones.
Standardized observability, deployment strategy, and performance guardrails across microservices.
achievements: Reduced release lead time by 45% with CI/CD standardization and deployment automation.
Improved peak order throughput by 3x through caching, queue-based processing, and query optimization.
Introduced architecture review process that aligned four squads on shared platform conventions.

summary: Built and evolved CRM and loyalty products for enterprise clients with both customer-facing and admin experiences.
responsibilities: Developed backend services, frontend modules, and mobile integrations for campaign and reward orchestration.
Collaborated with solution architects to design integration patterns for POS, ERP, and payment gateways.
Mentored developers on code quality, domain modeling, and cross-functional delivery.
achievements: Launched reusable frontend platform that shortened new client onboarding projects by 30%.
Delivered event-driven synchronization flows that minimized manual reconciliation work.
Improved application stability with structured logging, alerts, and incident review practices.

summary: Delivered web and mobile products for logistics, inventory, and field operations across SMEs and enterprise clients.
responsibilities: Implemented business workflows spanning dashboards, inventory movement, and field reporting.
Built APIs and admin interfaces while collaborating closely with QA and stakeholders.
Contributed to deployment setup, production troubleshooting, and optimization efforts.
achievements: Reduced reporting generation time from hours to minutes through batch processing redesign.
Introduced reusable UI patterns that improved consistency and maintainability across projects.
Supported multiple successful go-lives with strong post-launch reliability.
